title: galium jordanii subsp. fleurotii
intro: Galium jordanii subsp. fleurotii is a subspecies of the Galium jordanii plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is also known as Fleurot's bedstraw or Fleurot's galium, and is primarily found in the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. Galium jordanii subsp. fleurotii is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and promoting wound healing.
